ModMetaData.name: Castle Gates Connect to Embrasures
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description: Stop castle gates from breaking against embrasure walls. Multi-tile doors and gates (including Vanilla Factions Expanded – Medieval 2's castle gates) refuse to seal against see-through embrasures; this lets any embrasure wall — Medieval Overhaul, Fortifications – Medieval, and others — count as a proper connection while keeping the shoot-through slots. Works with any embrasure mod.
